content.question: We do not have recent (2020s) Hungary-specific causal estimates isolating the pure selection effect of the 6/8-grade gate from confounding factors (family investment, self-selection, prior ability) using post-2020 data.
content.reduction_path: Publication of updated Admin3-based causal estimates (e.g., follow-up to Hermann & Kisfalusi 2026) specifically comparing 6/8-grade gimnazium entrants to matched non-entrants.
